query:
-- Find RVC ICT Consulting customer
SELECT externalId, name, businessName, contactEmail, siteAddress, status
FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%RVC%' OR name LIKE '%Ian Donald%' OR businessName LIKE '%RVC%'
ORDER BY name LIMIT 10;

-- Find the two NBN services by external ID
SELECT id, externalId, serviceType, provider, planName, avcId, siteAddress, status, customerExternalId, monthlyCost
FROM services 
WHERE externalId IN ('13207099', '13300275') 
   OR avcId = 'AVC400045874456'
LIMIT 10;
